title: axonopus steyermarkii
intro: Axonopus steyermarkii is a type of grass native to South America, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Axonopus steyermarkii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Axonopus steyermarkii can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or poultice to utilize its medicinal properties.
